speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you go running up, you guys see now it circles back around and its wings tilt to one side as it begins to make its way towards the keep for a second sweep. I would like everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, the skyship has passed overhead, missing the top of the keep and the highest walls by about 40 or so feet. For a few seconds of silence, and you hear impact, shaking the ground for a few seconds. Not far from here, you can see another blast of red fire and a couple of sparks of arcane energy that arc out, as another column of smoke south of you begins to pour up into the sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Feeling that, I snap out of it and run to the south exit of the castle to look for the explosion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you start rushing in that direction, to the south side of the castle, looking back to where the skyship came through, you can see the smoke parts once more, and you see unfurling from within two large white wings bearing down, and you can see as it swoops down, there are groups of people that are rushing 100, 200, 300 feet away, that are pulling themselves out of the ravine that sits between the south walls of Emon and the north walls of your keep. As they're pouring through the mud and the stream there, it's about four or five feet deep, it swoops down and unleashes a blast of freezing cold energy that freezes that whole section of the river solid and every person in that vicinity as well. Locked in place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does Keyleth see all of this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't see this because you're inside the wall. You see it come down and swoop by. You see it circle around. You, however, have a good view of this, right as you're about to go down the wall on the ladder.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Vex, I need you on the roof.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right. I run up.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I have to roll initiative for it separately as part of the spell. It rolled a 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So I'm running balls-out to that tree, and I'm going to go right up against the tree. And fucking wait and that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Cool. All right, did you roll stealth?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, sure. I'm going to use Luck, I still have a little Luck today, good, that's better. 31.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 31. Good, good, good-- Okay, that ends your turn. Keyleth, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god. Okay, I'm afraid of everything-- I'm afraid if I throw up a Wall of Stone or anything like that, he'll be able to be like, oh, I'm a fucking dragon, so I'll go to the other side of the wall. Here's what I'm going to do: I'm going to start running towards the keep. Start running towards the keep. I'm going to go ahead and cast Conjure Woodland Beings. And I'm going to summon a giant eagle.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This is dropping my Fog Cloud, since that was real fucking useful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, where are you conjuring it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna conjure it right on the other side of him where it's-- I can then have it do an attack, correct? In the same turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I command it to go for its eyeballs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Eagle to the fucking face.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Eagle to the eye!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's inauspicious.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as the eagle goes up. Do you have stats for the eagle?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That eagle is weally weally close to that dwagon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh right, he's attacking, right, right. He has talons.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've got to roll for damage on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was more of a distraction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which spell is this? Conjure--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Conjure Woodland Beings.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Conjure Woodland Beings.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a 4th-level spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 4th-level spell, thank you. All right, great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It was a 19-- Oh wait, plus five is 21.
